sanskrit:
तत्त्ववित्तु महाबाहो गुणकर्मविभागयोः।
गुणा गुणेषु वर्तन्त इति मत्वा न सज्जते॥
transliteration: tattva-vit tu mahā-bāho guṇa-karma-vibhāgayoḥ | guṇā guṇeṣu vartanta iti matvā na sajjate ||
literal_meaning: The knower of reality, O mighty-armed, seeing the distinction between the gunas and (their) actions, knows that the gunas move among the gunas; thus he is not attached.
contextual_meaning: A psychologically integrated person observes thoughts, emotions and impulses as transient movements of nature (gunas) rather than personal identity, allowing dis-identified witnessing that prevents compulsive reactivity.
psychological_state: Meta-cognitive awareness—observing mental events as objects rather than becoming them; secure internal locus of control rooted in trans-personal Self.
trigger_scenario: You notice yourself spiraling into late-night doom-scrolling; instead of merging with the urge, you label 'restlessness is arising' and let the guna-pattern pass without acting on it.
anchor_text: Watch thoughts and feelings pass like clouds without claiming them as self.
